name: Taubman Centers, Inc.
description: Taubman Centers, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in the ownership, development, acquisition, and management of regional and super-regional shopping centers. Founded in 1950, the company has established a reputation for creating high-performing retail environments in major markets across the United States and internationally. Following its acquisition in 2020, Taubman now operates as a subsidiary of Simon Property Group. The company remains focused on delivering exceptional experiences for shoppers, retailers, and communities through its portfolio of productive, high-quality shopping destinations.
